## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm run check`
- [ ] `pnpm run test`
- [ ] `pnpm run build`
- [ ] Manual UI/API verification, if relevant

## Safety

- [ ] No API keys, uploaded novels, local databases, or model outputs are committed.
- [ ] User-facing risk warnings remain visible for originalization/export features.
- [ ] Docs are updated when behavior changes.
